allow: Bash(find "D:/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Schedule I" -name "*.cs" -type f -exec grep -h "protected override\\|public override" {} \\; | sort | uniq)
Bash(find "D:/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Schedule I" -name "*.cs" -type f -exec grep -E "^\\s+\(protected|public\)\\s+\(override|virtual\)\\s+void\\s+On" {} + | sort | uniq)
Bash(find "/D/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Schedule I" -name "*.cs" -type f 2>/dev/null ! -path "*/obj/*" | xargs grep -l "OnDeath\\|OnDestroy\\|Relationship\\|Customer" 2>/dev/null | head -20)
